accent-primary.purpose: User-customizable primary accent for active controls, selected states, and focus emphasis.

accent-secondary.purpose: Secondary-only accent for snooze, time warnings, notifications, and suspended-service indicators.

floating-panel.purpose: Opaque portal surface that prevents transparency bleed-through.

display.purpose: Hero greeting, briefing summary, Claude triage summary, and email reader subjects.

body.purpose: Dense repeated UI, cards, controls, labels, and summaries.

shadows.name: modal-dropdown
shadows.purpose: Portaled modals, dropdowns, popovers, and menu panels.

shadows.name: accent-glow
shadows.purpose: Small active indicators, focus glows, and timeline status dots.

motion.name: state-fast
motion.purpose: Default hover and simple state changes.

motion.name: dashboard-fade
motion.purpose: Dashboard section fade and orientation motion.

motion.name: reduced-motion
motion.purpose: Applied under prefers-reduced-motion to suppress nonessential animation.

rules: Use createPortal, fixed positioning, opaque #16161e, isolation, and scroll containment for floating panels.
Keep dense UI text inside stable dimensions so updates do not resize controls.
Use lucide icons for tool buttons when an icon exists.
Do not add side-stripe borders, gradient text, decorative glass, or hero metric templates.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Compact primary action with lavender fill or accent border, used only for meaningful state changes.
components.css: .ds-button-primary { background: #cba6da; color: #0b0b13; border: 1px solid rgba(203,166,218,0.15); border-radius: 12px; padding: 8px 12px; font: 600 12px/1.2 Montserrat, sans-serif; transition: background-color 150ms ease-out, border-color 150ms ease-out, box-shadow 150ms ease-out; } .ds-button-primary:focus-visible { outline: 1px solid rgba(203,166,218,0.6); outline-offset: 2px; box-shadow: 0 0 8px rgba(203,166,218,0.45); }

components.name: Dense Card
components.description: Inline content container with tonal depth and border-first separation.
components.css: .ds-card { background: rgba(36,36,58,0.4); color: #cdd6f4; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.04); border-radius: 12px; padding: 16px; box-shadow: none; } .ds-card h3 { margin: 0 0 6px; font: 500 13px/1.35 Montserrat, sans-serif; } .ds-card p { margin: 0; color: rgba(205,214,244,0.5); font: 400 12px/1.5 Montserrat, sans-serif; }

components.name: Floating Panel
components.description: Portaled overlay for dropdowns, pickers, command-like panels, history, and search.
components.css: .ds-floating-panel { position: fixed; isolation: isolate; overscroll-behavior: contain; background: #16161e; color: #cdd6f4; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08); border-radius: 16px; padding: 16px; box-shadow: 0 20px 60px rgba(0,0,0,0.7); }
